The Motion is GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED to the extent it seeks to compel responses to Plaintiff's written interrogatories and requests for production of documents. (Civ. Proc. Code, 708.020(c), 708.030(c).) Defendant Xiao Zhen Wu is hereby ordered to provide verified responses to this discovery no later than 60 days from the date of this Order. Plaintiffs' request for monetary sanctions is DENIED. A request for monetary sanctions must state the authority or "grounds for issuance of the order" in the notice of motion. (Cal. R. Ct. 3.1110(a).) While monetary sanctions may be awarded under Code of Civil Procedure sections 2023.030(a) and 2023.010(d) for misuse of the discovery process (see also Cal. R. Ct. 3.1348(a)), here Plaintiffs seek monetary sanctions under Code of Civil Procedure sections 2030.290 and 2031.300, which apply only where a party unsuccessfully makes or oppose a motion to compel. Plaintiffs also seek monetary sanctions under Code of Civil Procedure section 2023.010, but that section does not authorize sanctions for misuse of the discovery process; section 2023.030 does, and Plaintiffs do not cite it in the notice of motion and motion, or in their memorandum, and thus do not provide the requisite notice. Counsel to submit a proposed form of order to the Judge Pro Tem. Judge Pro Tem: Maxwell Pritt, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/JPT)
